title: Creation Date - Auotmation Question
excerpt:
Hello All, 
Does this automation still exist ? 
I have it enabled on one board and cannot work out how to readd to a new board. 
It’s as if it has been removed from the options ? 
Regards 
  
Ryan

posts.author: Rhyno3000 (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

auto1004×333 13.5 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
That specific one isn’t, but what you can do is one where ‘when created, set ‘date’ to today. Then ‘push’ date by 2 business days.

image1106×528 30.8 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ryan,

You can now recreate it using the updated version in Monday:

When an item is created → set Date to today → push Date by 2 business days

This gives you the same outcome as setting the Freight Quote Date to creation date + 2 business days.

You’re simply building it with the new automation structure instead of the old one.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar

Monday Certified Partner, Monday Wizard
